content: When fighting “An Eye for An Eye” (photo from Frenzied Wax Museum Covenant Interlude, but this also applies to the boss of 2-13), “Timid Doll” says that the boss will gain “Alertness” each time it receives active damage, but the effect gained when active damage is taken is instead named “Vigilance”.

Good afternoon! I was just doing the Special Ops for Helot: Catena and the dialogue and translation seemed very, very off and awkward. It caused me to stop playing more of the Special Op after finishing "Ally or Foe". I am not sure if this Special Op has not been translated by a human being yet, but it is extremely rough to try and go through.
